channel.title: Docs on Israel Jesús
channel.description: Recent content in Docs on Israel Jesús

item.title: About
item.description: Hey, there! 👋 I am Israel, a Software Development Engineer 👩🏻‍💻☁️ 🔭 I’m currently a member of MLSA || Microsoft Learn Ambassadors.

item.title: Certifications
item.description: AWS GenAI Amazon Web Services (AWS) Junio 2024 https://awsgenai.talento-cloud.com/#/my-activities-details?detailType=Certificates CCNA: Introduction to Networks Cisco Mayo 2024 https://www.credly.com/badges/97b82a76-3914-4815-a5d2-a9d8ad721c42/linked_in_profile Introducción a las Tecnologías Emergentes: Edición 2024 Santander Open Academy Mayo 2024 https://emtechdigital2024.thinkific.com/certificates/l85oy6a3mz Programa especializado: Soporte de Tecnologías de la Información de Google Google Noviembre 2023 https://www.coursera.org/account/accomplishments/specialization/GUGHY2MR8W2R Administración de sistemas y servicios de infraestructura de TI Google Noviembre 2023 https://www.coursera.org/account/accomplishments/records/26GSGJNT9W8A Los bits y bytes de las redes informáticas Google Noviembre 2023 https://www.coursera.org/account/accomplishments/records/LNA32PWT454F Seguridad informática: defensa contra las artes oscuras digitales Google Noviembre 2023 https://www.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Inclusive Education Platform for People with Disabilities integrated with AI Junio, 2024 https://goisra.github.io/WHEX/ Intelligent Energy Management for Federal Electricity Commission (CFE) Mayo, 2024 https://devpost.com/2311082152 Security Incident Management System Development (SGIS) for Converge Technology Solutions Abril, 2024 https://convergetp.com/
